info.name: Wolfram|Alpha Submit a Full Results Query

params.name: output
params.description: Response format. Use json for JSON output; default is XML.

params.name: format
params.description: Comma-separated list of content formats to include in results: image, plaintext, mathml, minput, moutput, cell, sound, wav.

params.name: includepodid
params.description: Include only pods with these IDs (comma-separated).

params.name: podtitle
params.description: Include only pods whose title matches this pattern.

params.name: podindex
params.description: Include only pods at these ordinal positions (comma-separated).

params.name: scanner
params.description: Include only pods generated by specific scanners.

params.name: async
params.description: Use asynchronous delivery for long-running computations.

params.name: location
params.description: Location name for geographically relevant results.

params.name: latlong
params.description: Latitude and longitude for location-aware results.

params.name: units
params.description: Measurement system. Values are metric or imperial.

params.name: width
params.description: Width in pixels for image results. Default is 500.

params.name: maxwidth
params.description: Maximum width in pixels for images.

params.name: timeout
params.description: Maximum processing time in seconds. Default is 5.

params.name: assumption
params.description: Assumption values to refine query interpretation.

items.docs: Submit a free-form natural language query to the Wolfram|Alpha Full Results API. Returns results in XML (default) or JSON with complete pod data, disambiguations, drilldowns, assumptions, and formatted mathematical/scientific output. Supports asynchronous delivery for long-running computations.
